response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to agentic workflows at Naver, along with deep systems skills in event-driven architecture and real-time systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure at Naver, including MCP frameworks
Proven expertise in event-driven systems, microservices, and low-latency backend design
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and developer platforms
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of architecting production multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops and auditability
